CVE-2020-23922.title: An issue was discovered in giflib through 5.1.4. DumpScreen2RGB i ...
CVE-2020-23922.description: An issue was discovered in giflib through 5.1.4. DumpScreen2RGB in gif2rgb.c has a heap-based buffer over-read.

CVE-2023-39742.title: giflib v5.2.1 was discovered to contain a segmentation fault via  ...
CVE-2023-39742.description: giflib v5.2.1 was discovered to contain a segmentation fault via the component getarg.c.

CVE-2025-31344.title: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in openEuler giflib on L ...
CVE-2025-31344.description:
Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in openEuler giflib on Linux. This vulnerability is associated with program files gif2rgb.C.

This issue affects giflib: through 5.2.2.

CVE-2026-23868.title: Giflib contains a double-free vulnerability that is the result of ...
CVE-2026-23868.description: Giflib contains a double-free vulnerability that is the result of a shallow copy in GifMakeSavedImage and incorrect error handling. The conditions needed to trigger this vulnerability are difficult but may be possible.

CVE-2026-26740.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in giflib v.5.2.2 allows a remote a ...
CVE-2026-26740.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in giflib v.5.2.2 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the EGifGCBToExtension overwriting an existing Graphic Control Extension block without validating its allocated size.
